title: Eternal Titan locks opponent magic on 5-6

card.rawText: During your turn, roll 1 die. If the result is 5-6, your opponent cannot play magic cards for 1 turn cycle.

plan.title: Eternal Titan locks opponent magic on 5-6
plan.summary: Summon Eternal Titan, activate its once-per-turn roll effect with a successful roll, and verify the opponent receives a Magic play restriction.

notes: Set Eternal Titan as player_1 primary creature.
Activate Eternal Titan's during-your-turn effect and force a successful 5 result.

steps: Set Eternal Titan as player_1 primary creature.
Apply the opponent Magic play restriction for 1 turn cycle.

expectedAssertions.label: Restriction is tracked on Eternal Titan

manualVerification: Confirm player_2 cannot play Magic cards while Eternal Titan's 1-turn-cycle restriction is active.
Confirm the restriction expires after the configured turn-cycle boundary.
riskNotes: This fixture verifies successful application and active tracking. It does not separately attempt a blocked Magic play action in the scenario.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Eternal Titan's successful 5-6 Magic play restriction.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
